review_reason: Fundamental mathematical blocker: discreteImmediateSucc_covers has 3 unfillable sorries. Blocking formulas constrain successor W but not intermediate K. The covering proof gap is structural - all known approaches have failed (research-007).

errors.message: discreteImmediateSucc_covers (DiscreteSuccSeed.lean) has 3 sorries at lines 525, 562, 595. These sorries are confirmed UNFILLABLE with current approach per research-007.
errors.recommendation: Accept axiom as documented technical debt OR pursue domain-specific approach from tense logic literature
